narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 3-A (precinct in Huron County) has 1,133 registered voters, with 67.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.2%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
